subcodes.first_line: O 'Aṭá! My bestowal hath descended from the heaven of My Kingdom, and the Kawthar of My presence hath flowed forth from the fountainhead of My Pen. Say: In the Name of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عطاء قد اتی عطائی من سماء ملکوتی و جری کوثر لقائی من معین قلمی قل بسم الله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
